page_metadata.biotools__summary: Calculates random combinations of a wide variety of reactions to list potential metabolic routes from initial to target compounds efficiently, which could be a heuristic approach in designing potential metabolic pathways in practical applications.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Calculates random combinations of a wide variety of reactions to list potential metabolic routes from initial to target compounds efficiently, which could be a heuristic approach in designing potential metabolic pathways in practical applications.
